hero_title: Experience the magic of Santiago del Estero
hero_subtitle: Discover the digital heart of Santiago del Estero, your ultimate guide to events, culture, gastronomy and the best destinations in the province.
que_es_text: DTSE (Destino Turístico Santiago del Estero) is not just an app, it's your personal portal to Argentina's oldest province. We've digitized every corner, from the Termas de Río Hondo to the Puente Carretero, to provide you with a frictionless experience.
que_es_mision: Our mission is to connect travelers with Santiago's vibrant culture through cutting-edge technology, ensuring every "chacarera" and every landscape is just a tap away.
viaja_text: Tools designed so your only concern is enjoying the Santiago sunshine.
tiempo_real_text: Receive alerts about ongoing events, weather and service availability instantly.
asistente_text: We have Uritu, our virtual assistant with all the knowledge of the province.
contacto_text: Have a question? Write to us and we'll respond shortly.
contacto_exito: Message sent successfully! We'll contact you soon.
footer_text: © 2026 DTSE - Destino Turístico Santiago del Estero
